description: Golden-file-backed integration tests for the list, show, and tag registry query commands using the IntegrationTest + TestContext framework

userStories.title: Registry Seeding Helper for Golden File Tests
userStories.description: As a developer, I want a shared seed_registry helper function that injects deployments_map.json fixture data into a TestContext's .treb/ directory and rebuilds the lookup index, so that all list/show/tag golden file tests can reuse the same registry seeding pattern via post_setup_hook.
acceptanceCriteria: helpers/mod.rs exists in crates/treb-cli/tests/ and exports seed_registry function
seed_registry reads deployments_map.json from treb-core/tests/fixtures/, writes it to .treb/deployments.json, and rebuilds the lookup index
The helper is importable from integration test files via mod helpers
cargo test --workspace passes

userStories.title: List Command Golden File Tests
userStories.description: As a developer, I want golden-file integration tests for treb list covering table output, JSON output, empty registry, ls alias, namespace/contract/type filters, and error paths, so that the list command's output format is locked down and regressions are caught automatically.
acceptanceCriteria: integration_list.rs contains 9 #[test] functions: list_table, list_json, list_empty, list_ls_alias, list_filter_namespace, list_filter_namespace_no_match, list_filter_contract, list_filter_type, list_uninitialized
All tests use IntegrationTest + run_integration_test + TestContext::new("project")
Tests that need deployments use post_setup_hook with seed_registry
list_table golden output contains a table with columns: Name, Label, Namespace, Chain, Type, Address, Verification
list_json golden output is a valid JSON array with 3 elements
list_empty golden output contains 'No deployments found'
list_filter_* tests show filtered subsets matching the expected filter results
list_uninitialized uses expect_err(true) and error mentions foundry.toml or treb init
PathNormalizer replaces workdir paths with <PROJECT_ROOT>
All tests pass with cargo test --workspace

userStories.title: Show Command Golden File Tests
userStories.description: As a developer, I want golden-file integration tests for treb show covering detail view by full ID, JSON output, proxy vs non-proxy display, resolution by contract name, and error paths, so that the show command's output format is locked down and regressions are caught automatically.
acceptanceCriteria: integration_show.rs contains 7 #[test] functions: show_full_id, show_json, show_proxy, show_non_proxy, show_by_contract_name, show_nonexistent, show_uninitialized
All tests use IntegrationTest + run_integration_test + TestContext::new("project")
show_full_id golden output contains section headers: Identity, On-Chain, Transaction, Artifact, Verification, Timestamps
show_json golden output is a valid JSON object with id, contractName, chainId, address fields
show_proxy golden output includes Proxy Info section with UUPS and implementation address
show_non_proxy golden output does NOT include Proxy Info section
show_nonexistent uses expect_err(true) and error contains 'no deployment found'
show_uninitialized uses expect_err(true) and error mentions foundry.toml or treb init
PathNormalizer replaces workdir paths with <PROJECT_ROOT>
All tests pass with cargo test --workspace

userStories.title: Tag Command Golden File Tests — Show and Add
userStories.description: As a developer, I want golden-file integration tests for treb tag show (default) and --add operations, so that tag display and add confirmation output is locked down and registry persistence after tag add is verified via golden files.
acceptanceCriteria: integration_tag.rs contains 5 #[test] functions: tag_show_empty, tag_show_json_empty, tag_add, tag_add_json, tag_add_then_show
tag_show_empty golden output contains 'No tags'
tag_show_json_empty golden output is valid JSON with "tags": []
tag_add golden output contains "Added tag 'v3-release'" and deployments.json artifact shows the tag
tag_add_json golden output is valid JSON with "action": "add" and "tag": "v3-release"
tag_add_then_show golden output shows both the add confirmation and the subsequent tag listing
PathNormalizer replaces workdir paths with <PROJECT_ROOT>
All tests pass with cargo test --workspace

userStories.title: Tag Command Golden File Tests — Remove and Errors
userStories.description: As a developer, I want golden-file integration tests for treb tag --remove and error paths (duplicate add, remove nonexistent, uninitialized), so that tag removal output and error messages are locked down and regressions are caught automatically.
acceptanceCriteria: 5 additional #[test] functions added to integration_tag.rs: tag_remove, tag_remove_json, tag_add_duplicate_error, tag_remove_nonexistent_error, tag_uninitialized (10 total across US-004 and US-005)
tag_remove golden output contains "Removed tag 'v3-release'"
tag_remove_json golden output is valid JSON with "action": "remove" and "tag": "v3-release"
tag_add_duplicate_error uses expect_err(true) and error contains 'already exists'
tag_remove_nonexistent_error uses expect_err(true) and error contains 'not found'
tag_uninitialized uses expect_err(true) and error mentions foundry.toml or treb init
All tests pass with cargo test --workspace

userStories.title: Output Format Fixes (if needed)
userStories.description: As a developer, I want to review all generated golden files for output correctness and fix any format discrepancies found in the list, show, or tag command implementations, so that the golden files accurately represent the intended output format.
acceptanceCriteria: All golden files have been reviewed for output correctness
Any output discrepancies found are fixed in the command source files
All golden files are regenerated after fixes
cargo test --workspace passes
cargo clippy --workspace passes with no warnings
